prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) paired with a **Precision Turbo wastegate (PT5566 actuator)** for the **EA888 Evo4 3.0L V6 TFSI (DCPC)** engine, targeting 650whp on **Motec M150 ECU** with custom ethanol mapping (E85 flex-fuel) and **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors**

Full **APR Stage 3+ high-pressure fuel system** with **AEM 400LPH in-tank pump**, **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank**, and **ID1700x injectors** for sustained boost under 2.2 bar (32 psi) with **Mishimoto aluminum core intercooler (URBANSPHERE-specific end tanks)**

Chassis reinforcement via **034 Motorsport X-Brace (Audi C8 platform-specific)** and **H&R Monotube Coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm drop)** with **Eibach ERS Hypercoil springs** for 30% stiffer roll resistance, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (400mm discs, URBANSPHERE-specific knuckles)**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (URBANSPHERE-exclusive carbon fiber fenders, 50mm extended wheel arches)** with **custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser (integrated LED light bar, active aero)** and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 22-inch forged wheels (ET25, 295/25R22 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R)**

**Lamborghini-style scissor doors (modified URBANSPHERE B-pillar hinges, electric actuation via **Kinsmart servo motors**)** with **custom Alcantara headliner (quilted diamond stitch, RGB ambient lighting by **Luxury LED**)**, and **carbon fiber door cards (forged carbon, 1.2mm thickness)**

**Seibon Carbon full roof replacement (dry carbon, 1.5mm weave, URBANSPHERE-specific sunroof delete)** with **custom laser-etched Audi rings (backlit, 3M Scotchlite reflective)** and **Rieger Tuning front splitter (adjustable dive planes, 40mm overhang, carbon-Kevlar hybrid)**
